videos.headline: Jake Weinberg makes 23-yard field goal
videos.description: Jake Weinberg puts Florida State on the board with a 23-yard field goal vs. Miami.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jake Weinberg makes 23-yard field goal) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: C.J. Daniels shows the hands on 47-yard reception
videos.description: Carson Beck finds C.J. Daniels for a 47-yard Miami gain.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (C.J. Daniels shows the hands on 47-yard reception) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck flings his first TD pass of the game to C.J. Daniels
videos.description: C.J. Daniels makes it look easy on the dart from Carson Beck for Miami’s first touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck flings his first TD pass of the game to C.J. Daniels) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miami picks off Tommy Castellanos to take over with great field position

videos.headline: C.J Daniels trolls Florida State after his 2nd TD for Miami
videos.description: CJ Daniels sings the FSU chant straight into the camera after another Miami touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (C.J Daniels trolls Florida State after his 2nd TD for Miami) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Irvin, Holly Rowe have a laugh after they both get knocked over
videos.description: Michael Irvin and Holly Rowe both topple over after a play on the sideline and share a laugh after the play.

videos.headline: Castellanos connects with McCoy for FSU’s first TD
videos.description: Lawayne McCoy in the end zone to get Florida State on the board against Miami.
